programs.title: House Hunters International
programs.sub_title: He'll Fight Anything but a Bug in Pattaya, Thailand
programs.desc: After falling in love with Thailand's rich tradition of combat sports, a Brazilian jiu-jitsu enthusiast looks to move there to train, teach and chill in Pattaya.

programs.title: House Hunters International
programs.desc: After a whirlwind romance in Texas, a newlywed couple relocates for a new job in Loughborough, England.

programs.title: House Hunters International
programs.sub_title: Luxury Lifestyle for Less in Brisbane, Australia
programs.desc: A British family's aspiration to relocate overseas has led them to choose Brisbane, Australia as their new home; while she seeks a residence with a pool and modern amenities in the city, he prioritizes cost-effectiveness.

programs.title: House Hunters International
programs.sub_title: Single Mom Finds Her Calm in Siem Reap, Cambodia
programs.desc: A single mom looks to leave the Los Angeles grind to fully immerse herself in Cambodian culture. She plans to move to a neighborhood where her dollars can stretch further, but her tween daughter prefers the posh expat lifestyle in central Siem Reap.

programs.title: Renovation Resort
programs.desc: Scott & Bryan work on adding value to the property, while the teams take on two small but critical spaces, the front entry and main bathroom. These high-traffic areas demand clever functionality and must make a stellar first impression. It's a designer showdown as Chalon & Tatianna both swing for the fences, Marcy finds herself stretched beyond her comfort zone, and Taylor's indecision explodes into a full-blown wallpaper fiasco!

programs.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programs.desc: Two British families set up shop in Spain to sell property to Britain families looking for a bit of fun in the sun.
